title: helm: Fix file descriptor leak in createFullPath
author: YadavAkhileshh

findings.description: os.OpenFile with O_CREATE|O_WRONLY never returns EEXIST; os.IsExist(err) branch is dead code. Remove or switch to O_CREATE|O_EXCL|O_WRONLY.
Commit 'helm: Fix file descriptor leak in createFullPath' missing SubArea — e.g. 'helm: repository: Fix file descriptor leak in createFullPath'.
Add a comment explaining os.Remove check guards against Windows FD-leak regression.
createFileIfNotThere now propagates non-IsNotExist os.Stat errors instead of masking them.
TestCreateFileIfNotThere covers creation, FD-free removal, and idempotent re-call without truncation.
